content: I just downloaded it and this keeps popping up whenever I try to login using Google, Facebook or Qooka
Thank you for your feedback. I will check what the problem is right away.<:Jenkin_think:1459079611131494543>

Alternatively, could you provide a high-resolution version of this image?
